question: Which Title of HIPAA was created to minimize the risk of patient's protected health information being seen by anybody who shouldn't see it while providing patients easier access to their own medical information?
canonical_answer: Title II, Preventing Healthcare Fraud & Abuse, Administrative Simplification and Enforcement of Group Health Insurance Requirments
